entries.plainMeaning: A picture of how your application works today.
entries.whyItMatters: Shows what exists now before any change is proposed.

entries.plainMeaning: A picture of how Stratosphere recommends running the app after modernization.
entries.whyItMatters: Helps compare today vs tomorrow in one view.

entries.plainMeaning: A confidence score for how prepared the migration plan is.
entries.whyItMatters: Shows if key information is missing before cutover work begins.

entries.plainMeaning: Questions that still need human answers.
entries.whyItMatters: Unknowns increase risk and should be resolved before deployment.

entries.plainMeaning: Keeping the old app running while a new version is validated.
entries.whyItMatters: Reduces outage risk and supports safer rollback.

entries.plainMeaning: Switching traffic back to the previous stable environment.
entries.whyItMatters: Protects the business if something goes wrong during cutover.

entries.plainMeaning: A component that keeps important stored data.
entries.whyItMatters: Needs extra migration care to avoid data loss or corruption.

entries.plainMeaning: A required approval from accountable people before execution.
entries.whyItMatters: Prevents accidental or unreviewed production changes.
